name: ConvertKit
description: ConvertKit (now Kit) is an email marketing platform built for creators. Use it to manage subscribers, send broadcasts, build automations with sequences, organize your audience with tags and forms, track purchases, and manage custom fields and webhooks.

capabilities.name: subscribers_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all subscribers with optional filtering by status, tag, and date range.

capabilities.name: subscribers_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details for a specific subscriber by ID.

capabilities.name: subscribers_create
capabilities.description: Create a new subscriber or update an existing one by email (upsert).

capabilities.name: subscribers_bulk_create
capabilities.description: Create multiple subscribers in a single batch request.

capabilities.name: subscribers_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing subscriber's data by ID.

capabilities.name: subscribers_unsubscribe
capabilities.description: Unsubscribe a subscriber from your list.

capabilities.name: subscribers_list_tags
capabilities.description: Retrieve all tags assigned to a specific subscriber.

capabilities.name: subscribers_get_stats
capabilities.description: Retrieve email engagement statistics for a specific subscriber with date filtering.

capabilities.name: tags_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all tags in your account.

capabilities.name: tags_create
capabilities.description: Create a new tag.

capabilities.name: tags_bulk_create
capabilities.description: Create multiple tags in a single batch request.

capabilities.name: tags_update
capabilities.description: Rename an existing tag by ID.

capabilities.name: tags_add_subscriber
capabilities.description: Apply a tag to a subscriber by subscriber ID.

capabilities.name: tags_add_subscriber_by_email
capabilities.description: Apply a tag to a subscriber by email address.

capabilities.name: tags_remove_subscriber
capabilities.description: Remove a tag from a subscriber by IDs.

capabilities.name: tags_bulk_add_subscribers
capabilities.description: Apply a tag to multiple subscribers in a single batch request.

capabilities.name: tags_list_subscribers
capabilities.description: Retrieve all subscribers that have a specific tag.

capabilities.name: forms_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all forms in your account.

capabilities.name: forms_add_subscriber
capabilities.description: Add a subscriber to a form by subscriber ID.

capabilities.name: forms_list_subscribers
capabilities.description: Retrieve all subscribers who signed up through a specific form.

capabilities.name: sequences_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all email sequences (automated drip campaigns).

capabilities.name: sequences_add_subscriber
capabilities.description: Enroll a subscriber into an automated email sequence by subscriber ID.

capabilities.name: sequences_list_subscribers
capabilities.description: Retrieve all subscribers enrolled in a specific sequence.

capabilities.name: broadcasts_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all broadcasts.

capabilities.name: broadcasts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single broadcast by ID.

capabilities.name: broadcasts_create
capabilities.description: Create a new broadcast email, optionally scheduling it for later delivery.

capabilities.name: broadcasts_update
capabilities.description: Update a draft or scheduled broadcast.

capabilities.name: broadcasts_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a broadcast by ID.

capabilities.name: broadcasts_get_stats
capabilities.description: Retrieve performance metrics for a sent broadcast including opens, clicks, and unsubscribes.

capabilities.name: broadcasts_get_link_clicks
capabilities.description: Retrieve click tracking data for links in a broadcast.

capabilities.name: custom_fields_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all custom fields defined in your account.

capabilities.name: custom_fields_create
capabilities.description: Create a new custom field for subscriber profiles.

capabilities.name: custom_fields_update
capabilities.description: Update a custom field label.

capabilities.name: custom_fields_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a custom field and all associated data.

capabilities.name: segments_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all subscriber segments.

capabilities.name: purchases_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of recorded purchases.

capabilities.name: purchases_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single purchase by ID.

capabilities.name: purchases_create
capabilities.description: Record a purchase transaction for a subscriber.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all webhooks in your account.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a new webhook for event-triggered notifications.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a webhook by ID.

capabilities.name: account_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve authenticated account details and creator profile.

capabilities.name: account_get_email_stats
capabilities.description: Retrieve email sending statistics for your account.

capabilities.name: account_get_growth_stats
capabilities.description: Retrieve subscriber growth metrics over a configurable date range.

capabilities.name: email_templates_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all available email templates.
